title: Intense Portuguese Cream Cheese Terrine
description: A keto-friendly terrine that blends smoky chouriço, earthy mushrooms and creamy cheese into a single-bowl masterpiece, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 160C and set up a bain-marie by placing a heatproof bowl in a larger baking dish filled with simmering water.
In a skillet, heat 1 tbsp olive oil over medium heat and sauté diced onion and minced garlic until translucent.
Add sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in chopped chouriço and cook for another 3 minutes to release its oil.
Deglaze the skillet with 50ml white wine, letting it reduce by half.
Remove skillet from heat, then fold in 200g cream cheese, 1 tsp paprika, and chopped parsley until well combined.
Transfer the mixture into the heatproof bowl, cover tightly with foil, and place it in the bain-marie.
Bake for 35 minutes, then remove from oven and let cool completely before refrigerating for at least 2 hours before serving.
